mapper.select:
SELECT item.ITEM_NO AS itemNo , item.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , MAX(io.PRICE) AS price , item.ITEM_STATUS AS itemStatus , ii.IMG_URL AS imgUrl , CASE WHEN item.CREATED_DT >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), '%Y%m%d') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isNew , COUNT(DISTINCT `order`.ORDER_NO) AS orderCount , COUNT(DISTINCT ir.REVIEW_NO) AS reviewCount FROM ITEM item JOIN ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING icm ON icm.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od ON od.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN `ORDER` `order` ON `order`.ORDER_NO = od.ORDER_NO AND `order`.ORDER_STATUS = 'PAID' LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION_GROUP iog ON iog.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION io ON io.GROUP_NO = iog.GROUP_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_IMAGES ii ON ii.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO AND ii.PRIMARY_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ITEM_REVIEW ir ON ir.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO
WHERE item.ITEM_STATUS IN ('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE')
AND icm.CATEGORY_NO IN
#{no}
GROUP BY item.ITEM_NO, item.ITEM_NAME, item.ITEM_STATUS, ii.IMG_URL, item.CREATED_DT
ORDER BY price DESC
ORDER BY orderCount DESC
ORDER BY item.CREATED_DT DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET ${(page - 1) * size}
